Home / Services / Tile Installation

Tile Installation

Expert tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.

From classic ceramic to modern porcelain and natural stone, we handle all types of tile installation with precision and care. We understand the unique challenges of Bakersfield homes, including foundation settling and extreme temperature fluctuations, and ensure proper preparation and installation techniques to prevent cracking and shifting. Our team will work with you to select the perfect tile for your style and budget, and ensure a flawless finish that will last for years to come. We handle everything from subfloor preparation to grout sealing, leaving you with a beautiful and durable tile floor or backsplash.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design - We discuss your needs and help you choose the right tile.
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise Measurements - Accurate measurements are taken to minimize waste and ensure a perfect fit.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation - Our experienced installers meticulously lay each tile with precision.
  4. 04 Step 4: Grouting and Sealing - We use high-quality grout and sealant to protect your new tile floor.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Home Value
  • Durable and Long-Lasting
  • Easy to Clean and Maintain
  • Variety of Styles and Designs

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of tile is best for Bakersfield's climate?

Porcelain tile is a great choice for Bakersfield due to its durability and resistance to temperature fluctuations and moisture. It's also less prone to cracking than some other tile types.

How long does tile installation take?

The timeframe varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but we always provide a clear timeline upfront. A typical bathroom floor might take 2-3 days.

Do you remove old flooring?

Yes, we handle the removal and disposal of your old flooring as part of our installation service. We ensure responsible disposal following local regulations.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with tile installation? Contact us today.
